failure.log_message: [SchemaRegistry] Failed schema registration batch: only '%s', '%b', '%t' are allowed as placeholders, got '%''
failure.suspected_root_cause: The Postgres placeholder converter preserves literal percent signs from SQLite-style DDL. psycopg treats the percent in CHECK(locator LIKE 'blob://%') as a placeholder marker unless it is escaped to '%%'.

rollback.note: Rollback can stop the current PG process and relaunch the SQLite command against the P063 backup/freeze artifacts if the follow-up repair cannot make PG ready.
